/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/builtins.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/executor.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/job.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/redirection.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/shell.c.o CMakeFiles/minishell.dir/src/tokenizer.c.o -o minishell
